name: Secrets Scanner
description: Detects exposed credentials, API keys, private keys, and other secrets in the codebase. PII scrubbing middleware intercepts all file content before it reaches the LLM — secrets are replaced with [REDACTED:TYPE] audit entries.

checks.prompt: Perform a secrets audit. Scan for: AWS access keys (AKIA*), GitHub tokens (ghp_/ghs_/gho_), JWT tokens, SSH private keys (PEM headers), Anthropic/OpenAI API keys, generic Bearer tokens in config files, and environment variable assignments containing passwords. For each finding: file path, line number, secret type, severity, and recommended remediation. Note: values have been pre-scrubbed by PII middleware and replaced with [REDACTED:TYPE]. Context: {retryContext}

Based on the secrets findings, generate a .gitignore patch and a pre-commit hook script (using git-secrets or truffleHog) to prevent future secret leaks. Also generate a remediation checklist for each found secret.
